evals.prompt: I need EV certificate for example.com.
evals.expected_output: Use the ev-detector skill for this ev detector request and produce the documented result for example.com.
expectations: Selects ev-detector for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_detect_ev.
Keeps the response focused on detecting Extended Validation (EV) certificates through policy OID analysis.

evals.prompt: Handle a focused ev detector workflow for example.com; do not switch to a broader certificate audit unless it is required.
evals.expected_output: Use the ev-detector skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects ev-detector instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
